title: Audit a repository for embedded secrets
description: A procedure to inventory secrets across the working tree and full history, then remediate by rotation before cleanup.
body: Use when taking ownership of a repo or before open-sourcing one. Do not assume the tree is clean because nothing was reported. Steps: scan the working tree and the full commit history with entropy and pattern detection; verify each finding safely without echoing the value; rotate every confirmed live secret; remove and relocate them to a manager; scrub history after rotation and rescan. Validation signals include a clean full-history rescan and confirmed rotations. Risk boundary: any live secret found is a leak requiring human notification, so escalate exposures and never publish the repo until rotation and rescan confirm it is clean.
